name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Request

### Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

Example:
> Add packet loss monitoring to ping sensors.

---

### Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve.

Example:
> Currently PingWatch only shows latency. Without packet loss metrics it is harder to diagnose network instability or ISP issues.

---

### Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine the feature working.

Example:
- Add packet loss calculation to ping sensors
- Display packet loss percentage in the dashboard
- Add a packet loss widget
- Trigger alerts when packet loss exceeds a threshold

---

### Example / Mockup (optional)

If possible, include a mockup, diagram, or example.

Example:


---

### Affected Areas

Select the relevant part of the project:

- Dashboard
- Devices
- Sensors
- Events
- Network Map
- Backups
- API
- UI / Frontend
- Backend
- Other

---

### Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches you considered.

Example:
> Instead of calculating packet loss in PingWatch, it could also be retrieved from SNMP counters.

---

### Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references.

Examples:
- Similar feature exists in PRTG / LibreNMS
- Useful for NOC monitoring screens
- Could improve troubleshooting for WAN links

---

### Priority (optional)

How important is this feature?

- Low
- Medium
- High
- Critical

---

### Would you like to contribute?

- [ ] I can help design this feature
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] I can help implement it
